"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import {
  ChevronDownIcon,
  ChevronLeftIcon,
  ChevronRightIcon,
} from "lucide-react"
import { DayButton, DayPicker, getDefaultClassNames } from "react-day-picker"
import { Button, buttonVariants } from "@/registry/new-york/ui/button"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const calendarDiv = tw.style({
    display: "flex",
    width: "size-[--cell-size]",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    justifyContent: "justify-center",
    textAlign: "text-center",
});

const calendarDayPicker = tw.style({
    position: "relative",
    aspectRatio: "aspect-square",
    height: "h-full",
    width: "w-full",
    userSelect: "select-none",
    padding: "p-0",
    textAlign: "text-center",
    "[&:first-child[data-selected=true]_button]": {
        borderRadius: "[&:first-child[data-selected=true]_button]:rounded-l-md",
    },
    "[&:last-child[data-selected=true]_button]": {
        borderRadius: "[&:last-child[data-selected=true]_button]:rounded-r-md",
    },
});

const calendarDayPicker2 = tw.style({
    color: "text-muted-foreground",
    userSelect: "select-none",
    borderRadius: "rounded-md",
    fontSize: "text-[0.8rem]",
    fontWeight: "font-normal",
});

const calendarDayPicker3 = tw.style({
    "has-focus": {
        borderWidth: "has-focus:border-ring",
        boxShadow: ["has-focus:ring-ring/50", "has-focus:ring-[3px]"],
    },
    borderWidth: ["border-input", "border"],
    boxShadow: "shadow-xs",
    position: "relative",
    borderRadius: "rounded-md",
});

const calendarDayPicker4 = tw.style({
    display: "flex",
    height: "h-[--cell-size]",
    width: "w-full",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    justifyContent: "justify-center",
    gap: "gap-1.5",
    fontSize: "text-sm",
    fontWeight: "font-medium",
});

const calendarDayPicker5 = tw.style({
    display: "flex",
    height: "h-[--cell-size]",
    width: "w-full",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    justifyContent: "justify-center",
    padding: "px-[--cell-size]",
});

const calendarDayPicker6 = tw.style({
    height: "h-[--cell-size]",
    width: "w-[--cell-size]",
    userSelect: "select-none",
    padding: "p-0",
    "aria-disabled": {
        opacity: "aria-disabled:opacity-50",
    },
});

const calendarDayPicker7 = tw.style({
    position: "absolute",
    inset: "inset-x-0",
    top: "top-0",
    display: "flex",
    width: "w-full",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    justifyContent: "justify-between",
    gap: "gap-1",
});

const calendarDayPicker8 = tw.style({
    position: "relative",
    display: "flex",
    flexDirection: "flex-col",
    gap: "gap-4",
    md: {
        flexDirection: "md:flex-row",
    },
});

function Calendar({
  className,
  classNames,
  showOutsideDays = true,
  captionLayout = "label",
  buttonVariant = "ghost",
  formatters,
  components,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof DayPicker> & {
  buttonVariant?: React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>["variant"]
}) {
  const defaultClassNames = getDefaultClassNames()

  return (
    <DayPicker
      showOutsideDays={showOutsideDays}
      className={tw.join("bg-background group/calendar p-3 [--cell-size:2rem] [[data-slot=card-content]_&]:bg-transparent [[data-slot=popover-content]_&]:bg-transparent", String.raw`rtl:**:[.rdp-button\_next>svg]:rotate-180`, String.raw`rtl:**:[.rdp-button\_previous>svg]:rotate-180`, className)}
      captionLayout={captionLayout}
      formatters={{
        formatMonthDropdown: (date) =>
          date.toLocaleString("default", { month: "short" }),
        ...formatters,
      }}
      classNames={{
        root: tw.join("w-fit", defaultClassNames.root),
        months: calendarDayPicker8.class(defaultClassNames.months),
        month: tw.join("flex w-full flex-col gap-4", defaultClassNames.month),
        nav: calendarDayPicker7.class(defaultClassNames.nav),
        button_previous: calendarDayPicker6.class(buttonVariants({ variant: buttonVariant }), defaultClassNames.button_previous),
        button_next: calendarDayPicker6.class(buttonVariants({ variant: buttonVariant }), defaultClassNames.button_next),
        month_caption: calendarDayPicker5.class(defaultClassNames.month_caption),
        dropdowns: calendarDayPicker4.class(defaultClassNames.dropdowns),
        dropdown_root: calendarDayPicker3.class(defaultClassNames.dropdown_root),
        dropdown: tw.join("bg-popover absolute inset-0 opacity-0", defaultClassNames.dropdown),
        caption_label: tw.join("select-none font-medium", captionLayout === "label"
                    ? "text-sm"
                    : "[&>svg]:text-muted-foreground flex h-8 items-center gap-1 rounded-md pl-2 pr-1 text-sm [&>svg]:size-3.5", defaultClassNames.caption_label),
        table: "w-full border-collapse",
        weekdays: tw.join("flex", defaultClassNames.weekdays),
        weekday: calendarDayPicker2.class(defaultClassNames.weekday),
        week: tw.join("mt-2 flex w-full", defaultClassNames.week),
        week_number_header: tw.join("w-[--cell-size] select-none", defaultClassNames.week_number_header),
        week_number: tw.join("text-muted-foreground select-none text-[0.8rem]", defaultClassNames.week_number),
        day: calendarDayPicker.class(defaultClassNames.day),
        range_start: tw.join("bg-accent rounded-l-md", defaultClassNames.range_start),
        range_middle: tw.join("rounded-none", defaultClassNames.range_middle),
        range_end: tw.join("bg-accent rounded-r-md", defaultClassNames.range_end),
        today: tw.join("bg-accent text-accent-foreground rounded-md data-[selected=true]:rounded-none", defaultClassNames.today),
        outside: tw.join("text-muted-foreground aria-selected:text-muted-foreground", defaultClassNames.outside),
        disabled: tw.join("text-muted-foreground opacity-50", defaultClassNames.disabled),
        hidden: tw.join("invisible", defaultClassNames.hidden),
        ...classNames,
      }}
      components={{
        Root: ({ className, rootRef, ...props }) => {
          return (
            <div
              data-slot="calendar"
              ref={rootRef}
              className={tw.join(className)}
              {...props}
            />
          )
        },
        Chevron: ({ className, orientation, ...props }) => {
          if (orientation === "left") {
            return (
              <ChevronLeftIcon className={tw.join("size-4", className)} {...props} />
            )
          }

          if (orientation === "right") {
            return (
              <ChevronRightIcon
                className={tw.join("size-4", className)}
                {...props}
              />
            )
          }

          return (
            <ChevronDownIcon className={tw.join("size-4", className)} {...props} />
          )
        },
        DayButton: CalendarDayButton,
        WeekNumber: ({ children, ...props }) => {
          return (
            <td {...props}>
              <div className={calendarDiv.class()}>
                {children}
              </div>
            </td>
          )
        },
        ...components,
      }}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}


const calendarDayButtonButton = tw.style({
    "data-[selected-single=true]": {
        backgroundColor: "data-[selected-single=true]:bg-primary",
        color: "data-[selected-single=true]:text-primary-foreground",
    },
    "data-[range-middle=true]": {
        backgroundColor: "data-[range-middle=true]:bg-accent",
        color: "data-[range-middle=true]:text-accent-foreground",
        borderRadius: "data-[range-middle=true]:rounded-none",
    },
    "data-[range-start=true]": {
        backgroundColor: "data-[range-start=true]:bg-primary",
        color: "data-[range-start=true]:text-primary-foreground",
        borderRadius: "data-[range-start=true]:rounded-md",
    },
    "data-[range-end=true]": {
        backgroundColor: "data-[range-end=true]:bg-primary",
        color: "data-[range-end=true]:text-primary-foreground",
        borderRadius: "data-[range-end=true]:rounded-md",
    },
    "group-data-[focused=true]/day": {
        borderWidth: "group-data-[focused=true]/day:border-ring",
        boxShadow: ["group-data-[focused=true]/day:ring-ring/50", "group-data-[focused=true]/day:ring-[3px]"],
        position: "group-data-[focused=true]/day:relative",
        zIndex: "group-data-[focused=true]/day:z-10",
    },
    display: "flex",
    aspectRatio: "aspect-square",
    height: "h-auto",
    width: "w-full",
    minWidth: "min-w-[--cell-size]",
    flexDirection: "flex-col",
    gap: "gap-1",
    fontWeight: "font-normal",
    lineHeight: "leading-none",
    "[&>span]": {
        fontSize: "[&>span]:text-xs",
        opacity: "[&>span]:opacity-70",
    },
});

function CalendarDayButton({
  className,
  day,
  modifiers,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof DayButton>) {
  const defaultClassNames = getDefaultClassNames()

  const ref = React.useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null)
  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (modifiers.focused) ref.current?.focus()
  }, [modifiers.focused])

  return (
    <Button
      ref={ref}
      variant="ghost"
      size="icon"
      data-day={day.date.toLocaleDateString()}
      data-selected-single={
        modifiers.selected &&
        !modifiers.range_start &&
        !modifiers.range_end &&
        !modifiers.range_middle
      }
      data-range-start={modifiers.range_start}
      data-range-end={modifiers.range_end}
      data-range-middle={modifiers.range_middle}
      className={calendarDayButtonButton.class(defaultClassNames.day, className)}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export { Calendar, CalendarDayButton }
